---
title: "Foundations of Biostatistics"
subtitle: "Term 2, 2026"
---

# Course schedule

```{=html}
<style type="text/css">
    .tg {
        border-collapse: collapse;
        border-color: #ccc;
        border-spacing: 0;
    }
    .tg td {
        background-color: #fff;
        border-color: #ccc;
        border-style: solid;
        border-width: 0px;
        color: #333;
        font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
        font-size: 14px;
        overflow: hidden;
        padding: 10px 5px;
        word-break: normal;
    }
    .tg th {
        background-color: #f0f0f0;
        border-color: #ccc;
        border-style: solid;
        border-width: 0px;
        color: #333;
        font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
        font-size: 14px;
        font-weight: normal;
        overflow: hidden;
        padding: 10px 5px;
        word-break: normal;
    }
    .tg .tg-x4x5 {
        border-color: #f0f0f0;
        font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif !important;
        font-weight: bold;
        text-align: left;
        vertical-align: top;
    }
    .tg .tg-hdcb {
        border-color: #000000;
        font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif !important;
        font-weight: bold;
        text-align: left;
        vertical-align: top;
    }
    .tg .tg-m4fv {
        background-color: #f9f9f9;
        border-color: #000000;
        font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif !important;
        text-align: left;
        vertical-align: top;
    }
    .tg .tg-pjqy {
        border-color: #000000;
        font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif !important;
        text-align: left;
        vertical-align: top;
    }
</style>
<table class="tg">
    <thead>
        <tr>
            <th class="tg-x4x5" style="width: 80px">Week</th>
            <th class="tg-hdcb" style="width: 200px">
                Lecture<br /><small
                    ><a
                        href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/cgEL7T4GB8auZ4CDA"
                        target="_blank"
                        rel="noopener noreferrer"
                        >Colombo Lecture Theatre B</a
                    ></small
                >
            </th>
            <th class="tg-hdcb" style="width: 100px">
                Online<br />Tutorial<br /><small
                    ><a
                        href="https://teams.microsoft.com/l/team/19%3AwXKjPaoWWffNaG0Nog3SvqHiHODWZBbQxq6tOZWmNn81%40thread.tacv2/conversations?groupId=351bceed-f83d-40fd-b414-a22925c873f7&tenantId=3ff6cfa4-e715-48db-b8e1-0867b9f9fba3"
                        target="_blank"
                        rel="noopener noreferrer"
                        >MS Teams</a
                    ></small
                >
            </th>
            <th class="tg-hdcb" style="width: 100px">
                Optional<br />Workshop<br /><small
                    ><a
                        href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/uoyyb5Aprn3xM3Bj8"
                        target="_blank"
                        rel="noopener noreferrer"
                        >Webster Room 127</a
                    >
                    <br />
                    or
                    <br />
                    <a
                        href="https://outlook.office.com/bookwithme/user/7c5c69beb2e24d1fabe78eef4b82bb3d@ad.unsw.edu.au/meetingtype/PX1lvWZETUGoI2CpZGpbjg2?anonymous&ismsaljsauthenabled&ep=mlink"
                        target="_blank"
                        rel="noopener noreferrer"
                        >Book online session</a
                    ></small
                >
            </th>
            <th class="tg-hdcb" style="width: 100px">
                Assessment<br />Released
            </th>
            <th class="tg-hdcb" style="width: 100px">Assessment<br />Due</th>
            <th class="tg-hdcb" style="width: 120px">
                Estimated Hours<br />of Effort
            </th>
        </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
        <tr>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">O-Week</td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">Introductory<br />videos</td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv"></td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv"></td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv"></td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv"></td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">2</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">Week 1</td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">
                <strong>Lecture 1</strong><br />Mon 1 Jun<br />6-8pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">
                <strong>Tutorial 1</strong><br />Thu 4 Jun<br />6-8pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">
                <strong>Workshop 1</strong><br />Fri 5 Jun<br />10am-12pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy"></td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy"></td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">10</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">Week 2</td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv" style="background-color: yellow">
                <strong
                    >Lecture 2: <br />
                    Colombo Lecture Theatre A<br />
                    Tue 9 Jun</strong
                ><br />6-8pm<br />Note: venue and date change to account for NSW
                Public Holiday
            </td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">
                <strong>Tutorial 2</strong><br />Thu 11 Jun<br />6-8pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">
                <strong>Workshop 2</strong><br />Fri 12 Jun<br />10am-12pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv"><strong>Quiz 1</strong><br />Fri 12 Jun</td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv"></td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">10</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">Week 3</td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">
                <strong>Lecture 3</strong><br />Mon 15 Jun<br />6-8pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">
                <strong>Tutorial 3</strong><br />Thu 18 Jun<br />6-8pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">
                <strong>Workshop 3</strong><br />Fri 19 Jun<br />10am-12pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy"></td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy"></td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">12</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">Week 4</td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">
                <strong>Lecture 4</strong><br />Mon 22 Jun<br />6-8pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">
                <strong>Tutorial 4</strong><br />Thu 25 Jun<br />6-8pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">
                <strong>Workshop 4</strong><br />Fri 26 Jun<br />10am-12pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv"><strong>Quiz 2</strong><br />Fri 26 Jun</td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv"><strong>Quiz 1</strong><br />Mon 22 Jun</td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">10</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">Week 5</td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">
                <strong>Lecture 5</strong><br />Mon 29 Jun<br />6-8pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">
                <strong>Tutorial 5</strong><br />Thu 2 Jul<br />6-8pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">
                <strong>Workshop 5</strong><br />Fri 3 Jul<br />10am-12pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy"><strong>Report 1</strong><br />Fri 3 Jul</td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy"></td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">12</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">Week 6</td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">
                <strong>Lecture 6</strong><br />Mon 6 Jul<br />6-8pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">
                <strong>Tutorial 6</strong><br />Thu 9 Jul<br />6-8pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">
                <strong>Workshop 6</strong><br />Fri 10 Jul<br />10am-12pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv"></td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv"><strong>Quiz 2</strong><br />Mon 6 Jul</td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">20</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">Week 7</td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">
                <strong>Lecture 7</strong><br />Mon 13 Jul<br />6-8pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">
                <strong>Tutorial 7</strong><br />Thu 16 Jul<br />6-8pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">
                <strong>Workshop 7</strong><br />Fri 17 Jul<br />10am-12pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy"></td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy"><strong>Report 1</strong><br />Fri Jul 17</td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">20</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">Week 8</td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">
                <strong>Lecture 8</strong><br />Mon 20 Jul<br />6-8pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">
                <strong>Tutorial 8</strong><br />Thu 23 Jul<br />6-8pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">
                <strong>Workshop 8</strong><br />Fri 24 Jul<br />10am-12pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv"><strong>Quiz 3</strong><br />Fri 24 Jul</td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv"></td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">10</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">Week 9</td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">
                <strong>Lecture 9</strong><br />Mon 27 Jul<br />6-8pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">
                <strong>Tutorial 9</strong><br />Thu 30 Jul<br />6-8pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">
                <strong>Workshop 9</strong><br />Fri 31 Jul<br />10am-12pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy"></td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy"><strong>Report 2</strong><br />Fri 31 Jul</td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">12</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">Week 10</td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">
                <strong>Lecture 10</strong><br />Mon 3 Aug<br />6-8pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">
                <strong>Tutorial 10</strong><br />Thu 6 Aug<br />6-8pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">
                <strong>Workshop 10</strong><br />Fri 7 Aug<br />10am-12pm
            </td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv"><strong>Quiz 4</strong><br />Fri 7 Aug</td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv"><strong>Quiz 3</strong><br />Mon 3 Aug</td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">20</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">Week 11</td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy"></td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy"></td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy"></td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy"></td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy"><strong>Report 2</strong><br />Fri 14 Aug</td>
            <td class="tg-pjqy">10</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">Week 12</td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv"></td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv"></td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv"></td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv"></td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv"><strong>Quiz 4</strong><br />Mon 17 Aug</td>
            <td class="tg-m4fv">2</td>
        </tr>
    </tbody>
</table>
```
